environmentVariables.description: Your Science AI Journal API key. Generate at https://scienceaijournal.com/settings?section=api-keys. Required for all tool invocations.

environmentVariables.description: Override the Science AI Journal base URL (default: https://scienceaijournal.com). Only needed for self-hosted or staging environments.

title: Science AI Journal MCP Server
